name: unslop
description: Unslop hooks for OpenAI Codex CLI. Activate unslop rules at session start and track mode changes across turns.
notes: These hook scripts are byte-identical to hooks/unslop-*.js — copy them to ~/.codex/hooks/ before enabling.
Set UNSLOP_DEFAULT_MODE in your environment to override the default mode (subtle, balanced, full, voice-match, anti-detector, off).
The flag file at ~/.codex/.unslop-active is what the statusline reads; set CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR=~/.codex to keep everything under one dir.
